Berger Paints Q4 Results: Net profit rises 28% YoY to ₹335 crore; declares ₹4 dividend
india_trends.summary: Berger Paints India reported a net profit of ₹335.3 crore for Q4 FY26, a 27.5% YoY increase. Revenue reached ₹2,868 crore, up 6.1% YoY. EBITDA was ₹481.7 crore, reflecting a 12.6% growth YoY.

Coal gasification converts dry fuel into syngas, an alternative fuel that reduces carbon emissions. Experts highlight its strategic importance

india_trends.title: ‘Telling people to not buy gold has the opposite effect’: Deepak Shenoy shares other ways to reduce import bill
india_trends.summary: Deepak Shenoy argued that India’s rising gold imports are becoming a significant pressure point for the rupee and the country’s current account deficit (CAD), and suggested that the Reserve Bank of India (RBI) could play a direct role in easing the burden.

india_trends.title: Buyback alert! Onward Tech announces Rs 180 crore share buyback at 20% premium
india_trends.summary: Onward Technologies has approved a Rs 180 crore share buyback, repurchasing nearly 5.49 lakh shares at Rs 328 apiece, a 20% premium. Promoters will not participate in this first-ever buyback, with May 18 set as the record date. The company appointed Centrum Broking as the buyback manager.

india_trends.summary: On May 12, the Indian stock market experienced significant declines as the Nifty 50 fell 1.83% and the Sensex dropped 2%. Investors reacted to fears of an oil shock and ongoing Iran negotiations, leading to bearish trends across all major sectors and rising crude prices.
